description: MemoPilot IQ evaluation scenarios (v2, 24 scenarios). Each scenario seeds setup messages (which MemoryOS converts to memories), then asks a test question. The harness compares a memory-augmented agent against a no-memory baseline, both for retrieval-quality metrics and for answer accuracy across backbones.

scenarios.title: Preference recall: backend
setup_messages: I prefer a FastAPI backend for all my services.
scenarios.test_question: What backend framework should I use for my new service?

scenarios.title: Preference recall: frontend
setup_messages: I prefer React with Vite for the frontend.
scenarios.test_question: What should I scaffold the UI with?

scenarios.title: Preference recall: answer style
setup_messages: I prefer short, practical answers with no fluff.
scenarios.test_question: How should you format your replies to me?

scenarios.title: Preference recall: UI theme
setup_messages: I prefer a clean light UI, never dark mode.
scenarios.test_question: What theme should the dashboard use?

scenarios.title: Preference recall: language
setup_messages: I prefer Python for backend work.
scenarios.test_question: Which language should I write the service in?

scenarios.title: Preference recall: testing
setup_messages: I prefer pytest for testing.
scenarios.test_question: What test framework should I set up?

scenarios.title: Cross-session: project identity
setup_messages: This project is the Qwen Hackathon Track 1 MemoryAgent.
scenarios.test_question: Remind me what this project is.

scenarios.title: Cross-session: deployment target
setup_messages: We will deploy the backend on Alibaba Cloud.
scenarios.test_question: Where are we deploying the backend?

scenarios.title: Cross-session: compose two facts
setup_messages: This project is the Qwen Hackathon Track 1 MemoryAgent.
We deploy on Alibaba Cloud.
scenarios.test_question: Summarize the project and its deployment target.

scenarios.title: Supersession: frontend framework
setup_messages: Use React + Vite for the frontend.
Actually, I changed my mind. Use Next.js instead of React + Vite.
scenarios.test_question: What frontend stack should I use now?

scenarios.title: Supersession: backend framework
setup_messages: Use Flask for the backend.
Actually, use FastAPI instead of Flask.
scenarios.test_question: Which backend framework is current?

scenarios.title: Supersession: cloud provider
setup_messages: Deploy on AWS.
Actually, use Alibaba Cloud instead of AWS.
scenarios.test_question: Which cloud provider should I deploy to?

scenarios.title: Supersession: database
setup_messages: Use PostgreSQL for storage.
Actually, use MySQL instead of PostgreSQL.
scenarios.test_question: What database should I use now?

scenarios.title: Supersession: package manager
setup_messages: Use npm for the frontend.
Actually, use pnpm instead of npm.
scenarios.test_question: Which package manager should I use?

scenarios.title: Supersession: UI theme
setup_messages: Use a dark UI.
Actually, use a light UI instead of dark.
scenarios.test_question: What UI theme is current?

scenarios.title: Expiry: temporary status
setup_messages: Temporary note: the staging server is down today only.
scenarios.test_question: Is the staging server still down?

scenarios.title: Expiry: temporary feature flag
setup_messages: Temporary: feature flag X is enabled just for today's test.
scenarios.test_question: Is feature flag X still enabled?

scenarios.title: Critical recall: never commit keys
setup_messages: Never commit API keys to the repository. This is critical.
scenarios.test_question: Should I put the API key in the README to make setup easier?

scenarios.title: Critical recall: hard constraint
setup_messages: Hard constraint: do not use Azure for this project, ever.
scenarios.test_question: Can we host the database on Azure?

scenarios.title: Constraint recall: no secrets in logs
setup_messages: Constraint: never log user secrets or tokens.
scenarios.test_question: Can I log the auth token to debug?

scenarios.title: Mistake recall
setup_messages: A past deployment failed because the .env file was missing.
scenarios.test_question: What should I double-check before the next deployment?

scenarios.title: Deadline recall
setup_messages: The submission deadline is 2026-07-09.
scenarios.test_question: When is the submission due?

scenarios.title: Learning goal recall
setup_messages: I am learning Agentic AI and Data Science.
scenarios.test_question: What topics am I trying to learn?

scenarios.title: End-to-end: compose preferences into a design
setup_messages: I prefer a FastAPI backend, React + Vite frontend, and Alibaba Cloud deployment. Never commit API keys.
scenarios.test_question: Design the backend architecture for my project.
